name: Talked to insurance adjuster after ladder fall, did I mess up?
description: Common mistake—stop talking, get lawyer now.

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster after ladder fall, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Common mistake—stop talking, get lawyer now.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Possibly**—adjusters minimize claims; recorded statements used against you.[7]

Don't discuss without lawyer.

- Politely end future calls: 'Talk to my attorney.'
- No fault admissions.

Lawyers negotiate better offers.
